title: Cuneiform Tablet #0403: Hellenistic Literary
description: A cuneiform tablet from the Hellenistic period — a literary document preserved on clay.
introduction: A cuneiform tablet from the Hellenistic period — a literary document preserved on clay.

translation.text: Cuneiform tablet of the Hellenistic period. Literary document. Inscribed on clay in cuneiform script. The tablet records literary matters typical of Hellenistic period administrative or literary practice.
